name: Sermsuk Public Company Limited
summary: Sermsuk Public Company Limited, together with its subsidiaries, manufactures and distributes soft drinks and beverages in Thailand. It operates through two segments, Carbonated Soft Drink and Non-Carbonated Soft Drink. The company provides drinking water, sport drinks, energy drinks, and other beverages, including tea and soda. It offers its products under the est, Crystal, Jubjai, 100 Plus, Wranger, Powerplus, v-boost, Oishi, and Rock Mountain brands. The company was founded in 1953 and is headquartered in Bangkok, Thailand. Sermsuk Public Company Limited is a subsidiary of So Water Co., Ltd.
